sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66731" key="metakomiste/os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μετακομ-ιστέος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n66731.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to betransported</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.710f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
